name: 1996 Honorable Mention: Caramel Oat Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix oats, brown sugar, and salt in a bowl until well combined.
3. Add milk, eggs, vanilla extract, melted butter, peanut butter, caramel sauce, coffee, baking soda, and red food coloring. Stir until smooth.
4. Pour mixture into an ungreased 9x13 inch pan. Spread evenly.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until set in the center but still slightly soft on top.
6. Remove from oven and let cool completely in pan before cutting into squares.
7. Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to one week.
